alprek_subset provenance
========================

Restricted source panel: not shipped with the package.
Canonical source file basename: student_panel_2021-2026.rds
Canonical source MD5: fd18882ba1a7ddc287300a7e5bafe84d
Builder: inst/scripts/build-alprek-subset.R
Builder version: 1
Seed: 2026
Selected real-site digest algorithm: MD5
Selected real-site digest: edcb883451655cf50b83f635ad221e32

Public artifacts:
- data/alprek_subset.rda: 7312 rows, 7 columns
- inst/extdata/alprek_subset.csv: 7312 rows, 7 columns
- inst/extdata/alprek_subset_counts.rds: 250 rows, 13 columns

Disclosure audit summary:
- synthetic sites: 50
- years: 5
- minimum public site-year n: 4
- maximum public site-year n: 126
- TANF zero-count site-year cells: 170
- original site_code and adece_id columns are not included in shipped artifacts.
- student_id is synthetic, sequential, and stable across years for the same selected child within a synthetic site.
- stable student_id values preserve longitudinal structure for examples but are not original source identifiers.
